summary: Completed testing of iteration 5 features: LiveInterview page redesign with AI Interviewer panel (Sarah Mitchell), removal of Live Transcript, and regression testing. All 5 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified working.

backend: Login returns token and user data

NO 'Live Transcript' or 'LIVE TRANSCRIPT' text on LiveInterview page - VERIFIED REMOVED
Recording controls: camera toggle, mic toggle, Enable Camera button, question navigation (5 buttons)
Landing page footer does NOT contain: Careers, Blog, Press, Help Center
Landing page footer contains: About Us, Contact Us, Donate Us, Feedback, Privacy Policy, Terms, Cookie Policy
Login page desktop back button works (data-testid='login-back-btn')
Signup page desktop back button exists (data-testid='signup-back-btn')
Dashboard loads with 4 stat cards and Role-Based/Resume-Based interview options

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features tested and working: (1) LiveInterview page completely redesigned - AI Interviewer panel shows professional woman image with 'Sarah Mitchell · AI Interviewer' label on left, user camera on right, question card below with interviewer name in chat-style, (2) Live Transcript UI completely removed - verified no text containing 'Live Transcript' on the page, (3) Footer cleanup verified, (4) Login/Signup back buttons working, (5) ResumeSetup 2-step wizard working. Backend tests in test_iteration5_features.py. 'Send Feedback to Email' remains MOCKED (UI-only placeholder).
